ymlConfigs.unified:
insigma:
  sysconfigure:
    defaultPassword: UserPw@123456
security:
  cache:
    enable: false
  cors:
    origins: http://localhost,http://localhost:8089,http://localhost:8090
  repeat:
    enable: true
  validatecode:
    enable: false
spring:
  autoconfigure:
    exclude: org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.mongo.MongoAutoConfiguration, org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.data.mongo.MongoDataAutoConfiguration, org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.data.redis.RedisAutoConfiguration
  jta:
    enabled: false
  main:
    allow-bean-definition-overriding: true
  datasource:
    type: com.alibaba.druid.pool.DruidDataSource
    url: jdbc:dm://192.168.183.102:5250
    username: HY_ZGGL_FRAME
    password: 1qaz@WSX3edc
    driver-class-name: dm.jdbc.driver.DmDriver
    druid:
      web-stat-filter:
        enabled: false
      stat-view-servlet:
        enabled: false
      filter:
        config:
          enabled: true
        slf4j:
          connection-log-enabled: false
          data-source-log-enabled: false
          enabled: true
          result-set-log-enabled: false
          statement-executable-sql-log-enable: true
          statement-log-enabled: false
        stat:
          enabled: true
          merge-sql: false
          slow-sql-millis: 5000
        wall:
          config:
            multi-statement-allow: true
          enabled: false
      initial-size: 5
      max-active: 200
      max-wait: 60000
      min-idle: 5
  jpa:
    hibernate:
      naming:
        physical-strategy: org.hibernate.boot.model.naming.PhysicalNamingStrategyStandardImpl
    properties:
      hibernate:
        dialect: org.hibernate.dialect.OracleDialect
    show-sql: false
  servlet: #请勿删除，去掉该层可能导致文件上传无法使用
    multipart:
      max-file-size: 4000MB
      max-request-size: 4000MB
      enabled: true #开启
